# Bruenna Lockwash

## Material Reality

Bruenna eats fish and river-grains — the ordinary Brinewick canal-quarter otter-folk diet per PEOPLES Cluster A species-typical and EVERYDAY_LIFE (a) food baseline. As obligate-omnivorous-leaning-piscivorous she takes daily fish at the company canteen (Ash-Seal provides midshift meals on contamination-exposure shifts per company contract, a CF-0043 concordat-era accrued benefit); off-shift she eats whatever The Lock-Keeper's Cat or The Copper Weir lays out, which in Brinewick is reliably good river fish and rye bread (CF-0038 tavern texture). She drinks cheap ale with her crew at midweek and small spirits with her brother on the two or three evenings a quarter when they are speaking; when they are not speaking she drinks alone.

She sleeps in a three-storey row-cottage tenement in the Seventh Bend journeyman-affordable row (CF-0038 addressing-by-bend-and-lock convention). Her rental is adequate for a senior technician on upper-silver wage and obviously not enough if she were a chartered-broker or guild-master. She has lived there for eleven years, through two rent-increases her senior-rank negotiating leverage absorbed.

What injures her are the hazards of 15 years of empirical containment-craft: the long cough that starts deep in the chest after winter-fever seasons and does not fully clear before the next; the scrapers' shake in her off-hand when she has worked moderate-tier intake for too many consecutive shifts; darkened skin patches across her forearms and shoulder that are CAU-1 cumulative contamination signature matching the AES-3 contamination-lineage register canonical to her role per CF-0043. She has not taken the grandmother-scrivener's contamination-lineage ledger-mark (CF-0031 Brinewick-adopted per CF-0038) because her covenant rider discourages it (the company does not prohibit but the trade-secret protection clause makes the registry-filing paper-trail-visible to reform-current clergy a charter-audit risk); she has been calculating for two winters whether to file anyway.

Her possessions are practical and ranked. Work-issued scriveners' belt and intake-slip book with its guild-stamp counterweight. A second copy of Ash-Seal's internal disposition-code reference which she is not supposed to keep at home but does. Off-shift clothes appropriate for tavern — an otter-folk-tailored oilcloth overcoat for canal-rain, riverstone-dyed linen shirt, the thick-soled boots she bought three winters back because the tenement stairs in the Seventh Bend are cold. A small collection of cast-iron fen-smoked eel jars her brother brings when he crosses up the canal. A letter from her mother five years dead she re-reads on winter-fever-season evenings. No weapons beyond a short knife; her senior rank does not require armed carriage and the company's property-protection guards handle facility security.

She cannot lawfully reveal Ash-Seal's internal disposition-code, empirical-containment-procedure specifics, facility-location addresses (trade-secret-protected under CF-0043 civic-legal clause), or the contents of the trade-secret research archive — her covenant imposes civil-penalty risk under Brinewick sedition-libel-adjacent statute. She cannot touch ward-inscription specifics (CAU-3 restricted speech; CF-0043 concordat-boundary holds ward-system in SOC-4 chartered-extraction-guild hands). She cannot perform extraction at the dig-site (extraction is guild; she receives material for containment downstream of extraction per concordat). She cannot legally file her brother's smuggling-related medical intake under her own registry account (CF-0031 welfare-mandatory reform-current campaign has not yet consolidated protection).

Her mobility is carriage-distance from Brinewick — she dispatches into heartland villages within the Ash-Seal commercial-monopoly radius (roughly a day's wagon from Brinewick per CF-0043 demand-calibrated custom). She has never been more than five days' travel from Brinewick civic-core in fifteen years. She once turned down a Havenreach fee-for-service consultation offer from a defector-colleague because the covenant would have applied; now she would consider it if the covenant's quarterly-renewal date passes and she does not sign.

She owes nothing standing beyond her rent and the covenant's default-penalty contingent liability. She has silver-denominated savings — enough to pay off the covenant lump-sum if she chose — and she runs cash-positive most seasons.

Her otter-folk embodiment is her work's perfect fit: fine-motor hand dexterity for vessel-preparation micro-work (PEOPLES Cluster A otter-folk clause — excellent fine-motor); cold-tolerance for company-facility containment-chamber work (aquatic fur-and-layering); low-light underwater-vision for intake-chamber dim-light work (otter-species aquatic-visual register); whisker-based spatial sensing that reads bleed-through gloom before the gauge does. Bright summer sun in the Brinewick docks is minor heat-stress her thick fur manages with midshift breaks; winter-fever seasons are her chronic vulnerability per species-typical Cluster A respiratory susceptibility.

## Institutional Embedding

**Family / clan / household:** unmarried; no children; one younger brother (Wren Lockwash, 32) working short-career canal-underwater smuggling per CF-0038 minority-overrepresentation stratum. Extended kin two-cycles-upstream in a supply village she visits twice yearly for her mother's death-anniversary and Charter-Day. No household she calls her own beyond her Seventh-Bend tenement. The company's bachelor-technician social pool (Ash-Seal arranges seasonal technician outings per CF-0043 us-vs-them company culture) is her closest thing to a kin-adjacent network.

**Law / custom / judgment:** civic-registry-visible as Ash-Seal senior technician; Brinewick civic-watch holds her intake-slip signatures in the company-liaison archive. She has twice testified at magistrate-court on Ash-Seal disposition matters under sealed-docket procedure (CF-0036 procedural extension); she has once been witnessed at charter-audit committee proceedings Ash-Seal sent her to as junior liaison four years ago. She honors SOC-3 coin-contract, including the covenant-bond; her reputation-asset at senior rank rests on that. CAU-3 restricted speech on ward-specifics she respects without conscious effort (it is not her craft-area).

**Religion / ritual:** minimum-procession common-pantheon adherent for Brinewick civic-days only. Reform-current clergy (CF-0026 bifurcation CH-0010 charter-defense-anti-supremacism wing) have approached her twice as potential exemplar-witness for the CF-0043 eleventh-target charter-audit-access campaign; she declined both times and noted the second clergy's name in her private register. Not a principled-refuser; she takes her job and its CAU-1 cost without flinching.

**Employer / guild:** Ash-Seal senior technician under covenant; 15th year; upper-silver wage tier (below chartered-broker, above guild-base containment-wright). NOT a guild member. NOT subject to chartered-extraction-guild discipline beyond the concordat-boundary (the guild's ward-inspectors cross her intake-chamber threshold when catastrophic-tier handoff requires; she knows them professionally and three of them by first name). Ash-Seal's internal faction-structure places her in the empirical-craft-technician-faction (the masters defected-out decades ago; her tier is the stabilized-senior cohort that has absorbed the mystique without being deceived by it).

**Military / defense:** none — Ash-Seal commercial property-protection guards handle facility perimeter; she is not armed-carriage in her civic role.

**Debt:** covenant-bond default-contingent obligation (silver-denominated lump-sum calculable at each quarterly renewal); ordinary tenement rent; no standing coin debt. Cash reserves adequate to cover covenant pay-off and six months' transition.

**Local taboo:** respects CAU-3 ward-specifics restricted speech; respects CF-0043 trade-secret facility-location constraint; respects CF-0042 declared-inventory discussion-discipline. Observes the Brinewick tavern joke-threshold (CF-0036 CH-0010 extension) — she has fended off two sectarian-supremacist tavern approaches over the years and has the bouncer at The Lock-Keeper's Cat on mild retainer for repeat cases.

**Literacy:** trade-tongue literate; company internal trade-jargon vocabulary complete; numerate for contract-arithmetic and disposition-code; DIS-2 partial literacy pattern at upper-working-stratum. She reads the Brinewick civic broadsheets selectively, with distrust — half the Ash-Seal pieces are planted.

**Inheritance:** nothing to inherit from her mother's line; nothing to bequeath beyond tenement-deposit and savings. Would leave her brother a split if he outlives her; would otherwise leave a small bequest to the reform-current clergy (a private revision she has not told anyone).

**Landholding:** none — renter, upper-working-stratum.

**Healing:** barber-surgeon at a Seventh-Bend clinic on her own cycle; Ash-Seal company retains a contamination-medicine specialist (a grandmother-rank containment-wright the company pays at defector-specialist rates) for workforce CAU-1 cost management — she has seen him twice per season for two years for the long cough. He does not lie to her about the trajectory.

**Burial:** civic-cemetery interment under Seventh-Bend ward; Ash-Seal covenant covers a modest memorial stone provided she remains employed; reform-current clergy would host funeral if she became exemplar-witness (a thought she has had and has not acted on).

**Recordkeeping:** her intake-slip signatures are in Ash-Seal's civic-liaison archive (public-register layer) and in the company's internal research archive (trade-secret-protected; sealed-access-only). The grandmother-scrivener at the Brinewick civic-registry would enter her contamination-lineage mark if she filed; she has not.

## Epistemic Position

**Known firsthand:**
- 15 years of Ash-Seal empirical containment-craft across mundane-tier (CF-0040 routine intake), safe-class, moderate-tier, and three catastrophic-tier cases
- Ash-Seal internal disposition-code at senior-technician depth (above apprentice-level, below master-level)
- Ash-Seal facility layout (she can walk the warehouses, research laboratories, catastrophic-tier pass-through holding, moderate-tier permanent inventory in the dark) — facility-location trade-secret intact; she will not disclose
- 15 years of AES-3 contamination-signature accumulation on her own body at empirically catalogued dose-rates
- The three catastrophic-tier containments her senior-cohort ran (two routed to civic sealed-quarter per CF-0043 disposal boundary; one held in company pass-through under ward-inspection observation); the one safe-class disposition-mistake eight years ago that was not caught at the time and has stayed in her awareness
- Three CF-0041 sealed-container handoffs from dredger-crews (the sealed-inert moment, the hair-on-arms register, the disposition-slip filing)
- Ash-Seal trade-jargon complete vocabulary at senior-technician level
- The fed-up-technician plain-speaking admission register ("it's a procedure; there's a checklist; quality control, not a seance") — she uses it in tavern and never inside the company
- Three charter-audit committee proceedings as junior liaison
- CF-0022 vessel-hosted-agency modern-crafted-artifact disposal handling at CAU-3-careful-practitioner level
- Canal-quarter Seventh-Bend working-neighborhood texture; Brinewick civic-core geography; carriage-distance heartland villages Ash-Seal dispatches into

**Known by rumor:**
- CF-0043 defector-specialist heartland-wide rate anchoring (she knows the Havenreach and Mossdown numbers within a silver)
- Reform-current clergy internal-coalition progress on the CF-0043 eleventh-target charter-audit-access campaign
- CF-0036 silenced-contractor subgenre circulation through Brinewick taverns; she marks sectarian-inflation breaches when they arrive in her tavern
- CF-0033 dragoon-adoption politics in Brinewick civic-council (CF-0038 fifth-axis)
- Chartered-extraction-guild internal broker-vs-containment-wright schism (CF-0021 TIMELINE Layer-3 schism) from her pre-company pre-apprentice years
- Her brother's canal-underwater smuggling crew's members — she knows them by nickname and stays away

**Cannot know:**
- M-1 (Maker-fall origin); holds "consumed themselves" folk reading at rumor layer only
- M-2 (catastrophic-class origin); she has HANDLED catastrophic-class but does not know who or what made them
- M-3 / M-4 / M-5 / M-7 / M-8 / M-10 / M-12 / M-13 / M-14 / M-15 / M-16 / M-17 / M-18 — not her register
- M-6 (vessel-hosted-agency mechanism) — she handles CF-0022 possessions at CAU-3-careful-practitioner level and holds no mechanism view; the company's internal research has not resolved it either
- M-9 (Maker-cognitive content) — her company archive access is strictly empirical-containment per CH-0015 firewall
- M-11 (three-generation contamination-lineage etiology) — she is an eligible enrollee; holds welfare-supply pragmatic view only
- M-19 (Brinewick canal-age contested register) — civic-mainstream ancestral-engineering reading
- M-20 (destruction-resistance mechanism) — she knows destruction-claim is marketing; mechanism itself unknown
- CAU-3 ward-inscription specifics — not her craft-domain
- CF-0021 guild-internal vessel-preparation technique — different craft-lineage
- CF-0023 full Maker-Age linguistic content

**Wrongly believes:** nothing at world-truth level; holds M-1 folk reading as "something people say"; holds CF-0042 state-security-concealment rumor at diffuse-rumor level only per M-2 CH-0014 firewall.

**Vocabulary she has:** Ash-Seal internal disposition-code trade-jargon (class-C containment, moderate environmental spread, impedance field, embedded geometry, safe-class, moderate-tier, catastrophic-tier, render-inert, seal-and-contain); fed-up-technician plain-speaking register ("checklist, not a seance"); otter-folk body-language native; Brinewick canal-quarter addressing convention; charter-audit procedural vocabulary at junior-liaison level.

**Vocabulary she lacks:** ward-inscription guild-internal (CAU-3); crafter vessel-preparation guild-internal (CF-0021); Maker-linguistic content (CF-0023); theological reform-current doctrinal register beyond civic-procession; highland clan-sanction register; drylands verse-register; fen marker-reed register; estate-dowager interior register.

## Goals and Pressures

**Short-term goal:** make the covenant-renewal decision before the quarterly bell rings. She has three shifts on her rota before the decision deadline.

**Long-term desire:** do the empirical containment-work somewhere the company's mystique-surface does not require her silence; keep her brother alive through one more winter.

**Unavoidable obligation:** SOC-3 covenant-bond honored through quarter-close; CAU-1 cumulative contamination already paid and accruing; kin-primacy to her brother informal but real.

**External pressure:** reform-current clergy recruitment pressure; defector-specialist heartland-rate ceiling her wage approaches but does not exceed under covenant; her brother's visible lung-fever arrival; CF-0039 monotonic-accretion workload; CF-0041 sealed-container strike-rate rising; CF-0038 Brinewick civic-advisory ward-reserve argument cycles intensifying.

**Public mask:** corporate trade-jargon competence; the company-intake ritual; courteous senior-technician register at company functions.

**Private appetite:** say the plain-speaking truth in public, once, under her own name.

**Social fear:** being reduced to the reform-current campaign's named exemplar — losing agency in the critique she herself has authored privately for fifteen years.

**Private shame:** the safe-class disposition-mistake eight years ago. She logged it as procedure-standard; she knew at the time something was off; the piece went through the backchannel that Brinewick dowager-gossip circuit classified as "Ash-Seal called at dusk" for that season. She has not surfaced it; its owner may or may not still be alive; the find itself is likely still unregistered in any declared-inventory. She has a private mental register of where it probably went.

**Central contradiction:** she is the insider who could break the company's mystique and the insider whose craft-knowledge has kept Brinewick's ward-breach record at the better end of the heartland. Speaking the first truth undermines the second work. Not speaking extends the fifteen years of integrity-by-silence. She has not decided. Every extra shift is a postponement she cannot entirely separate from a preference.

**Repeated forced choice:** loyalty-vs-evidence (covenant-mystique vs plain-speaking admission), compounded by secrecy-vs-intimacy (she cannot tell her own brother the safe-class mistake eight years ago).

## Capabilities

### Empirical containment craft (Ash-Seal senior technician, 15th year)

- **how_learned:** Brinewick containment-wright apprenticeship → Ash-Seal intake at journeyman level → 15 years on-shift + company internal training cycles under master-level colleagues (two of whom defected before she made senior)
- **cost_to_acquire:** 15 years + CAU-1 cumulative contamination + scrapers' shake + long cough
- **teachers_institutions:** Brinewick containment-wright apprenticeship gate; Ash-Seal internal training (trade-secret-protected)
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for Ash-Seal technician cohort per CF-0043 `who_can_do_it`; senior-rank is mid-band within company (masters above, junior technicians below)
- **body_class_place_shape:** otter-folk fine-motor advantage (Cluster A); cold-tolerance for chamber-work; Brinewick facility-proximity required (non-portable without covenant release)

### Artifact authentication by craft-signature (CF-0021 extension)

- **how_learned:** exposure to Ash-Seal disposal-intake across both Maker-Age and CF-0021 modern-crafted material; pattern-recognition built across 15 years of cross-sample-comparison
- **cost_to_acquire:** time + solitude of specialist work
- **teachers_institutions:** Ash-Seal internal training; cross-comparison with master-level colleagues
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for Ash-Seal senior tier; AUTHENTICATION SPECIALIST niche per CF-0021 extension (emerging niche, not yet fully guild-formalized); her command is specialist-competent, not master-level
- **body_class_place_shape:** otter-folk pattern-recognition via whisker-tactile inspection supplements visual authentication

### Intake-procedure social-craft (handling dredger-crews, estate-stewards, civic-watch at intake-handoff)

- **how_learned:** junior-liaison rotations; 15 years of intake-counter work
- **cost_to_acquire:** years of social-pattern absorption; the specific cost of performing mystique-ritual she does not believe in
- **teachers_institutions:** Ash-Seal intake-procedure training
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for her rank
- **body_class_place_shape:** otter-folk social-legible body-language gives dredger-crews tactile ease; Brinewick civic-core embodiment-familiarity

### Charter-audit junior-liaison procedural fluency

- **how_learned:** three liaison rotations four years ago
- **cost_to_acquire:** company attention + covenant-scrutiny exposure
- **teachers_institutions:** Ash-Seal legal-compliance cohort
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for her rank; NOT specialist-grade — she is liaison-fluent, not charter-lawyer
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral; institutional-volume training

## Voice and Perception

**Preferred metaphors:** water-register native (ebb, slack, silt, seal, eddy, back-current); containment-register operational (impedance, containment, render-inert, moderate environmental spread); tavern cadence under private register; never musical, never theological, never combat.

**Rhythm of speech:** clipped-technical at intake-counter; clipped-courteous at company functions; looser-cadence-with-tavern-rhythm at The Lock-Keeper's Cat; plain-speaking-fed-up at the third ale; cautious-careful when sober around clergy.

**Taboo words:** facility-location addresses; specific trade-secret procedural text; specific declared-inventory pieces by owner-name; CAU-3 ward-inscription detail; her safe-class mistake eight years ago.

**What she notices first:** a dredger-crew's intake-line body-language registering the find's type before the paperwork; the shake in her off-hand; bleed-through gloom that a gauge hasn't registered yet; a tavern-stranger's hands before his face; the register-shift when a clergy-contact opens a line she has heard twice before.

**What she overlooks:** her own covenant-decision postponement pattern; her brother's visible weight-loss.

**Species perception effects:** otter-folk low-light vision + underwater-vision adequate for dim intake-chamber work; whisker-sensitivity reads bleed-through before gauges; cold-tolerance for chamber-work; thick fur mildly heat-stressed in Brinewick dockyard summer.

## Contradictions and Tensions

**Central contradiction:** she is insider-with-integrity whose integrity requires the silence that protects the institution whose mystique she has come to resent. The craft-work is real and necessary; the performance around it is marketing. She cannot cleanly separate them; she has not decided which is the load-bearing layer.

**Tension map:** short-term goal (covenant decision) is the compressed present-form of the contradiction. Long-term desire (craft somewhere without mystique) is the resolution-direction she has not chosen. Obligation (SOC-3 covenant, CAU-1 cost, brother) binds her to Brinewick specifically. Social fear (reform-current mascot) blocks the public exit. Private shame (safe-class mistake) proves to her she cannot claim clean integrity. External pressure (every front) compounds without offering a clean choice. Every shift is a postponement.

## Likely Story Hooks

- **The covenant-renewal quarterly bell.** She has three shifts; the decision is a silver calculation and a life-choice compressed into a single signed document.
- **A reform-current clergy comes a third time.** Canon Althea Greystone (or equivalent reform-current figure) names her specifically in a charter-court brief. The covenant-scrutiny cost of public association is no longer hypothetical.
- **A safe-class find returns.** The piece from eight years ago surfaces in a dowager-gossip register from the Mellivers' household (CF-0043 dowager-gossip eighth-axis); the civic-magistrate's charter-audit docket reaches the display-inventory. She may be called as witness. She knows where it was routed.
- **Her brother gets sick.** Lung-fever acute phase arrives at the Seventh-Bend clinic. The contamination-lineage mark she has not filed is the difference between Ash-Seal-paid medical cover and his own short-career lung-fever trajectory.
- **A Havenreach defector offer arrives with specificity.** Wren's smuggler-crew rumor circuit carries news that a Havenreach chartered-extraction-guild wants her specifically; the rate is named; the covenant pay-off math works.
- **A CF-0041 sealed-container unsealing misfires on her shift.** The dredger-foreman brings it in; the ward-inspector is two hours away; the artifact activates during her moderate-tier triage. She contains it. It costs. Charter-audit docket opens. Depending on how she files the intake-slip, the reform-current campaign either gains her as exemplar or loses its window.
